intro: Myrsine sessiliflora, also known as Kuding or Chinese Vervain, is a shrub native to Asia, belonging to the family Myrsinaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which may aid in reducing fever, improving digestion, and enhancing overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Myrsine sessiliflora include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in water to make a cold-pressing beverage, known as "kuding tea," which is consumed for its health benefits and flavor.
